news.t: First Trust Announces Timeline for Changes to Investment Strategies, Name and Other Related Matters for First Trust Merger Arbitrage ETF
First Trust Announces Changes to Investment Strategies, Name and Other Related Matters for First Trust Merger Arbitrage ETF

overview.description: The First Trust Merger Arbitrage ETF (MARB) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in long/short alternatives. The fund is an actively-managed global fund that uses a merger arbitrage strategy to long takeover target and short the acquiring company. MARB was launched on Feb 4, 2020 and is issued by First Trust.
